song.title: Jesus My All
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Why should I fear the darkest hour, Or tremble at the tempter’s pow’r? Jesus vouchsafes to be my tow’r.
[V2] 2) Though hot the fight, why quit the field, Why must I either fly or yield, Since Jesus is my mighty shield?
[V3] 3) When creature comforts fade and die, Worldlings may weep, but why should I? Jesus still lives, and still is nigh.
[V4] 4) Though all the flocks And herds were dead, My soul a famine need not dread, For Jesus is my living bread.
[V5] 5) I know not what may soon betide, Or how my wants shall be supplied; But Jesus knows, and will provide.
[V6] 6) Though sin would fill me with distress, The throne of grace I dare address, For Jesus is my righteousness.
[V7] 7) Tho’ faint my prayers and cold my love, My steadfast hope shall not remove, While Jesus intercedes above.
[V8] 8) Against me earth and hell combine; But on my side is pow’r divine; Jesus is all, and He is mine
song.author: John Newton
